This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Property flow-tolerance value 'normal'
  assert_true: flow-tolerance doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
[FAIL] Property flow-tolerance value 'infinite'
  assert_true: flow-tolerance doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
[FAIL] Property flow-tolerance value '10px'
  assert_true: flow-tolerance doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
[FAIL] Property flow-tolerance value '20%'
  assert_true: flow-tolerance doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
[FAIL] Property flow-tolerance value 'calc(20% + 10px)'
  assert_true: flow-tolerance doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
[FAIL] Property flow-tolerance value 'calc(-0.5em + 10px)'
  assert_true: flow-tolerance doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
[FAIL] Property flow-tolerance value 'calc(0.5em + 10px)'
  assert_true: flow-tolerance doesn't seem to be supported in the computed style expected true got false
